hero.headline: Plumbing Done Right. Not Just Fast.

intro.label: A plumbing studio, not a dispatch center
intro.body: Licensed master plumbers serving Bainbridge Island and the north Seattle neighborhoods. Emergency response, drain clearing, water heater replacement, and remodel rough-in done properly — permit pulled, inspection passed, no gray-area work.

personas.label: Emergency Repair
personas.kicker: For the leak that can't wait

configuratorTeaser.headline: Get a written estimate in under a minute.
configuratorTeaser.body: Describe the issue and get a transparent price range before any call.

zPatternRows.label: Emergency First
zPatternRows.headline: An active leak doesn't wait for tomorrow.
zPatternRows.body: Burst pipe, major leak, sewage backup — these are real emergencies. Licensed plumber on-site the same day, not next week. Flat-rate diagnosis before a wrench turns so you know exactly what you're paying before the work starts.

zPatternRows.label: Camera Diagnosis
zPatternRows.headline: We find the actual cause, not just clear the symptom.
zPatternRows.body: Camera inspection on every drain and sewer line job. If there's root intrusion, a collapsed section, or a build-up point, we show you — on screen, in writing — before recommending repair or replacement. No guesswork, no unnecessary excavation.

zPatternRows.label: Permit-Managed
zPatternRows.headline: The permit is proof the work is safe.
zPatternRows.body: Every job that requires a permit gets one. We pull it, schedule the inspection, and pass it before we close the job. That permit protects your home insurance, your resale value, and your family. No gray-area work that lives in the walls forever.

zPatternRows.label: The Guarantee
zPatternRows.headline: One-year workmanship, emergency line after hours.
zPatternRows.body: Every installation carries a one-year workmanship warranty. Emergency line active after hours for anything that comes up. We stand behind the work — because a properly done plumbing job shouldn't need a callback.

footerCta.headline: Ready to get the plumbing done right?
footerCta.subhead: We'll be in touch within a few hours to schedule a visit.
